text:
Contractors already understand the asset.

You know materials.
You know labor.
You know when a property is hiding expensive problems.

The next step is learning the investor side: numbers, structure, offer strategy, and exit plan.

Learn the deal side of the business.

visual.openai_prompt: Create a premium contractor-to-investor visual for The Real Estate Deal Lab. Dark navy background, refined gold accents, work boots beside a clean pro forma sheet, blueprint lines, tool belt, calculator, and a Florida residential property silhouette. Serious operator education mood, not blue-collar cliche. Leave lower-left negative space. Avoid luxury flex imagery, cash piles, guru seminar energy, clutter, rendered text, fake logos, sci-fi, music-stream visuals, anime, futuristic culture motifs, and unrelated tech-brand visual motifs.
visual.headline: FROM SKILL TO OWNERSHIP

text:
The Deal Lab Method is simple.

Find.
Analyze.
Structure.
Close.
Scale.

Most people want to skip straight to the close. That is where mistakes get expensive.

Save this framework.

slides.openai_prompt: Create a premium navy and gold real estate carousel cover for The Real Estate Deal Lab. Private deal-room desk, five clean deal folders arranged in sequence, subtle blueprint lines, calculator, property photo. Leave clean lower-left negative space. No rendered text.
slides.headline: THE DEAL LAB METHOD

slides.openai_prompt: Premium deal-room slide with property search notes, map pins as abstract gold dots, and a clean notebook. Dark navy and gold, no readable text.

slides.headline: 3. STRUCTURE

slides.headline: CLOSE THEN SCALE

slides.headline: JOIN THE LAB

text:
The bootcamp gives you the foundation.
The advisory gives you direct guidance.

One helps you learn the process.
The other helps you apply it with more support.

The real question is not which offer is better.
It is what level of help you need right now.

Book a 15-minute fit call.

visual.openai_prompt: Create a premium offer education visual for The Real Estate Deal Lab. Dark navy and gold split composition, one side showing a bootcamp workbook and group worksheet stack, the other side showing private advisory folder and strategy call notes. Serious and restrained, high-touch deal-room mood. Leave lower-left negative space. Avoid luxury flex imagery, income guarantees, cash piles, guru seminar energy, clutter, rendered text, fake logos, music-stream visuals, anime, futuristic culture motifs, and unrelated tech-brand visual motifs.
visual.headline: FOUNDATION OR GUIDANCE?

text:
Would you rather learn the 70% rule or cash-on-cash return first?

Vote, then run your next deal through the Analyzer.
